body.title: Search tree traversal emits narrative assembly to console
body.result: _emit_search_trace() added to cortex.py; fires at both search() return points; gated on IGOR_SEARCH_TRACE=true env var
body.description: When cortex.search() fires and activates nodes, print a brief trace of what's assembling: activated node IDs + narrative snippets (first 60 chars). Helps diagnose conversation flow gaps — see which memories are being activated (or not) per turn. Format: [SEARCH] query='...' → node1: narrative... / node2: narrative... Display only when IGOR_SEARCH_TRACE=true env var set, so it's off by default.
